name: nba-api-server
description: Real-time NBA game data, player statistics, team information, and game predictions. IISNode compatible for Windows/IIS deployment.

scripts.build: tsc && npm run copy:migrations && npm run copy:templates
scripts.copy:migrations: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const path=require('path'); const src='src/migrations'; const dst='dist/migrations'; if(!fs.existsSync(dst))fs.mkdirSync(dst,{recursive:true}); fs.readdirSync(src).forEach(f=>{fs.copyFileSync(path.join(src,f),path.join(dst,f))})"
scripts.copy:templates: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const path=require('path'); const src='src/templates'; const dst='dist/templates'; if(!fs.existsSync(dst))fs.mkdirSync(dst,{recursive:true}); fs.readdirSync(src).forEach(f=>{fs.copyFileSync(path.join(src,f),path.join(dst,f))})"
